name: webflow
description: Use Webflow MCP and agent skills to manage CMS content, audit sites, publish safely, work in Designer, and run Webflow CLI workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Manage CMS, audit sites, and publish with Webflow MCP
interface.longDescription: Use Webflow MCP plus Webflow agent skills to manage CMS content, audit SEO, accessibility, assets, and links, prepare safe publishes, work in Designer, and run Webflow CLI and Code Components workflows.
